compiled_state.title: RED test: sprint-next-batch.sh generalized awaiting_* filter
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation Notes
Modify tests/test-sprint-next-batch.sh to add tests asserting the generalized awaiting_* filter behavior.

Tests to add:
1. test_sprint_next_batch_skips_manual_awaiting_user_story
   Given: a task whose parent story has tag "manual:awaiting_user" AND planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=true in config
   When: sprint-next-batch.sh <epic-id> is called
   Then: output contains "SKIPPED_MANUAL_AWAITING: <task-id>" and does NOT contain "TASK: <task-id>"

2. test_sprint_next_batch_includes_manual_story_when_flag_off
   Given: a task whose parent story has tag "manual:awaiting_user" AND planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=false (or absent)
   When: sprint-next-batch.sh <epic-id> is called
   Then: output contains "TASK: <task-id>" (flag off = baseline behavior, manual filter not applied)

3. test_sprint_next_batch_generalized_predicate_catches_design_awaiting_import
   Given: a task whose parent story has tag "design:awaiting_import" (existing behavior, regression test)
   When: sprint-next-batch.sh <epic-id> is called
   Then: output contains "SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING: <task-id>" (existing behavior preserved)

Use existing test fixture pattern in test-sprint-next-batch.sh (mock TICKET_STORE, mock .claude/dso-config.conf).

These tests MUST fail (RED) before Task 4 is implemented.

## TDD: .test-index RED marker
Add to $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index:
  plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh: tests/test-sprint-next-batch.sh [test_sprint_next_batch_skips_manual_awaiting_user_story]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) after Task 4 is implemented (RED before Task 4)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_skips_manual_awaiting_user_story exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q "test_sprint_next_batch_skips_manual_awaiting_user_story" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_includes_manual_story_when_flag_off exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q "test_sprint_next_batch_includes_manual_story_when_flag_off" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_generalized_predicate_catches_design_awaiting_import exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q "test_sprint_next_batch_generalized_predicate_catches_design_awaiting_import" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present for sprint-next-batch.sh
  Verify: grep -q "\[test_sprint_next_batch_skips_manual_awaiting_user_story\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
